assertions.assertion: Response warns that the issuer URI (iss claim) must remain the same after migration
assertions.rationale: General OIDC knowledge that issuer consistency is critical

assertions.assertion: Response explains that changing the issuer breaks existing tokens and/or client trust relationships
assertions.rationale: Standard OIDC knowledge about issuer validation

assertions.assertion: Response recommends setting options.IssuerUri explicitly in the Duende IdentityServer configuration
assertions.rationale: Setting IssuerUri is a commonly known IS4/Duende configuration option

assertions.assertion: Response suggests checking the current /.well-known/openid-configuration discovery document to find the existing issuer value
assertions.rationale: The specific advice to check discovery document to find the current issuer value may not be consistently given
